user_goal: 在 B017 经验签收（B015 regime-aware activation 不缩窄 B013 vs 60/40 gap；B016 HRP 不缩窄 B010 vs 60/40 gap，HRP -$496 + turnover +41%）之后，做 gap root-cause attribution 批次：用 B014 真实 yfinance snapshot 量化 B013 与 B010 vs static 60/40 的 absolute-return gap 来源，按资产 / 按策略 layer（L1 / L2 / L3 / defensive routing）做归因，并跨三轴做参数 sensitivity sweep（vol_target {5,8,10,12,15}% × universe ablation 4-5 variant × rebalance cadence 3-4 variant）；输出诊断报告含至少 3 个 Pareto-style 配置推荐（low-DD / balanced / high-return 带具体 trade-off 数字）。**B018 不修改任何 strategy / spec / 测试默认参数**（任何 retune 候选只入 backlog）。保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、纯 stdlib trade/ 模块（无 scipy/numpy/pandas/sklearn）、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。
evaluator_feedback: B018 F003-F005 PASS. Real-data attribution and sweep report completed on snapshot regime-adaptive:b69883b08eedea7d. Dominant drag is l2_vol_scaling; l1_gating is secondary. vol_target and cadence are the actionable axes; universe ablation is mostly constrained by defensive invariants. Report and signoff written, and backlog candidate BL-B018-S1 added for a follow-up B010 cadence / vol-target retune.
